title: Headache for three days
description: You wake up with a strong headache. You go to the doctor to describe your symptoms and get advice.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Hello. How can I help you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: I have had a headache for three days.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Do you have a fever too?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: No, I have no fever.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Are you sleeping well?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: No, I can't sleep at night.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Take these pills twice a day.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Thank you very much, Doctor.

title: Ordering in a café
description: You sit at a Berlin café and want to order breakfast and coffee.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Good morning! What would you like?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: I would like a coffee, please.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: With milk and sugar?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Only with milk, please.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Would you like something to eat too?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Yes, I'll take a croissant.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: That's five euros, please.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Here you go. Keep the change.

title: Buying a jacket
description: You are in a clothing store and want to try on a jacket.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Can I help you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Yes, I'm looking for a jacket.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: What size are you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: I wear size forty.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Try this one on.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: It fits me very well.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: It costs ninety euros.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: I'll take it. Can I pay by card?

title: Meeting a new colleague
description: It's your first day at a new job. You introduce yourself to a colleague.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Hi, I'm Maria. You're the new one, right?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Yes, my name is Ahmad. Nice to meet you!

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Where are you from?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: I come from Syria, but I've been living here for two years.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Cool! What do you do here?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: I work as a software developer.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Let's have lunch together!

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Gladly! When works for you?

title: Buying a train ticket
description: You are at the Berlin train station and want to buy a ticket to Hamburg.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: How can I help you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: I need a ticket to Hamburg.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: One-way or round-trip?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Round-trip, please.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: When would you like to travel?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Tomorrow morning, if possible.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: The next train leaves at eight o'clock.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Perfect. From which platform?

title: Weekend plans with a friend
description: Your friend calls to discuss what to do this weekend.

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Hey! What are you doing this weekend?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Nothing planned yet. Do you have an idea?

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: We could go to the movies.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Good idea! Which film is playing?

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: The new Marvel film just came out.

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: I've been wanting to see that for a long time!

turns.speaker: system
turns.english: Shall we meet on Saturday at seven?

turns.speaker: user
turns.english: Sounds great. See you then!
